final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic poster illustrating the traditional costume of a Chinese ethnic minority group, presented as a scholarly illustrated reference plate (图鉴) in the style of a national museum exhibition panel.

Style/medium: photorealistic central figure or object; museum exhibition panel / historical costume illustrated reference (图鉴); documentary infographic layout; not a poster, not fashion photography, not anime, not e-commerce
Composition: full vertical infographic layout — top: Chinese main title + subtitle + introductory text; left column: structural exploded-view diagram with Chinese leader-line annotations and close-up detail insets; upper right: material/craft/texture swatches with Chinese captions; middle right: pattern samples, main color palette swatches with cultural meaning explanations in Chinese; bottom: dressing sequence flowchart + core characteristics summary panel; central area: full-body standing figure (photorealistic, if costume-based) or central object exploded diagram
Subject: traditional costume of a Chinese ethnic minority — automatically select the most representative and visually rich subject (e.g. Miao, Yi, Dong, Tibetan, Mongolian, or other); show complete costume system including all key garment components, accessories, and structural parts
Scene/backdrop: warm off-white / silk-paper white / light tea-color paper texture background; refined, restrained, collectible quality
Lighting/mood: even, diffused scholarly lighting; no dramatic shadows; clean and legible
Color palette: derived from the selected costume's authentic color system; overall palette restrained and museum-grade; background in 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色
Materials/textures: paper grain texture on background; realistic fabric, embroidery, silver ornament, and weave textures on costume and material swatches
Text (verbatim): 所有文字必须为简体中文，清晰、规整、可读；包含：中文主标题、副标题、导语、结构引线标注、材质说明、纹样寓意、色彩含义、穿着顺序说明、核心特征总结
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese characters only — no English, no pinyin, no garbled characters, no typos; layout must follow the specified five-zone structure exactly; central figure must be photorealistic full-body standing pose or exploded structural diagram; annotations must use clean leader lines with accurate labels; material swatches must show realistic textures
Avoid: poster aesthetic, portrait-studio feel, e-commerce layout, anime or illustration style, cosplay feel, incorrect structural annotations, blurry or unreadable text, fake or generic textures, excessive decorative elements, English labels, pinyin labels
